name: autodialectics
description: Run the local Autodialectics anti-slop harness from Codex through reusable skills and repo-aware workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Run the repo's anti-slop harness from Codex
interface.longDescription: Adds a repo-local Codex plugin for compiling tasks, executing anti-slop runs, inspecting artifacts, benchmarking policies, and evolving champions with the existing Autodialectics CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use Autodialectics to compile and run a task from this repo.
Benchmark the current Autodialectics policy and summarize the results.
Inspect a prior Autodialectics run and explain the gate decision.
